children.text:
Welcome to FollowMyHealth®, an innovative health engagement solution that empowers patients to take a more active role in managing their care.

FollowMyHealth® is used by tens of thousands of physicians as the "power" behind their hospital or clinic's specific patient portal.

Whether you're looking to keep an eye on your weight, monitor your blood pressure, or manage a chronic condition, FollowMyHealth® is the tool for you!
